# CeBIT Australia

**Dates:**

Start date:29 Oct 2026

End date:31 Oct 2026

Start date:29 Oct 2027

End date:31 Oct 2027

Start date:29 Oct 2028

End date:31 Oct 2028

Start date:29 Oct 2029

End date:31 Oct 2029

Start date:29 Oct 2030

End date:31 Oct 2030

**Location:**

Sydney Australia

**Place:**

321 Kent St, Sydney NSW 2000, Australia

**Industries:**E-Business, E-Commerce Information Technology, Communication Technology

**Event information:**

CeBIT Australia - APAC's largest B2B Technology EventShare... [Show more](https://www.booking-expo.com/events/cebit-australia#)
